contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: DAPP §9b + §16 sweep — 23 pages adopt signed-request/Edgar-response panel + print expansion; promoted to dapp_prod
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/31
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/32
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/33
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/34
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/35
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/36
  
  Details:
  Standardized DAPP submission UX so every signed Edgar write surfaces the exact request payload and Edgar response in <pre> blocks (§9b), and so every textarea + result block prints fully (§16). 23 PRs landed on dapp_beta and were promoted to dapp_prod via gh repo sync (CNAME divergence preserved, no --force).
  
  Pages updated in this sweep: report_tree_planting (#14), report_capital_injection (#15), report_inventory_movement (#16), report_dao_expenses (#17), report_sales (#18), report_asset_receipt (#19), report_contribution (#20), governor_permissions (#21), partner_check_in (#22), mint_donation (#23), create_proposal (#24), review_proposal (#25), notarize (#26), register_farm (#27), currency_conversion (#28), repackaging_planner (#29), warmup_review (#30), update_qr_code (#31), batch_qr_generator (#32), create_signature (#33), scanner (#34), stores_nearby (#35), store_interaction_history (#36).
  
  Final 6 PRs (this resume) + dapp_beta → dapp_prod sync are the verifiable proof points.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
